en: Oh give thanks to the LORD; call upon his name; make known his deeds among the peoples!
zh: 你們要稱謝耶和華，求告他的名； 在萬民中傳揚他的作為。

en: Sing to him, sing praises to him; tell of all his wondrous works!
zh: 你們要向他歌唱，歌頌他， 講論他一切奇妙的作為。

en: Glory in his holy name; let the hearts of those who seek the LORD rejoice!
zh: 你們要以他的聖名誇耀； 願尋求耶和華的人都心裡歡喜。

en: Seek the LORD and his strength; seek his presence continually!
zh: 你們要追求耶和華與他的能力， 常常尋求他的面。

en: Remember the wondrous works that he has done, his miracles, and the judgments he uttered,
zh: 記念他所作的奇事、 他的神蹟， 和他口裡的判詞。

en: O offspring of Abraham, his servant, children of Jacob, his chosen ones!
zh: 他僕人亞伯拉罕的後裔啊！ 他所揀選的人，雅各的子孫哪！

en: He is the LORD our God; his judgments are in all the earth.
zh: 他是耶和華我們的 神， 他的判詞充滿全地。

en: He remembers his covenant forever, the word that he commanded, for a thousand generations,
zh: 他永遠記念他的約， 他記念他所吩咐的話，直到千代，

en: the covenant that he made with Abraham, his sworn promise to Isaac,
zh: 就是與亞伯拉罕所立的約， 向以撒所起的誓。

en: which he confirmed to Jacob as a statute, to Israel as an everlasting covenant,
zh: 他把這約向雅各定為律例， 向以色列堅立為永遠的約，

en: saying, "To you I will give the land of Canaan as your portion for an inheritance."
zh: 說：“我必把迦南地賜給你們， 作你們產業的分。”

en: When they were few in number, of little account, and sojourners in it,
zh: 那時，他們人數不多， 實在很少，而且是在那地寄居的。

en: wandering from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people,
zh: 他們從這邦飄流到那邦， 從這國飄流到另一國。

en: he allowed no one to oppress them; he rebuked kings on their account,
zh: 他不容任何人欺壓他們， 為了他們的緣故，他曾指責君王，說：

en: saying, "Touch not my anointed ones, do my prophets no harm!"
zh: “不可傷害我的受膏者， 也不可惡待我的先知。”

en: When he summoned a famine on the land and broke all supply of bread,
zh: 他命令饑荒臨到那地， 斷絕了一切糧食的供應。

en: he had sent a man ahead of them, Joseph, who was sold as a slave.
zh: 在他們之前，他差遣一個人去， 就是被賣為奴的約瑟。

en: His feet were hurt with fetters; his neck was put in a collar of iron;
zh: 人用腳鐐弄傷他的腳， 他的頸項被鐵鍊鎖著，

en: until what he had said came to pass, the word of the LORD tested him.
zh: 直到他的話應驗， 耶和華的話為他證實的時候。

en: The king sent and released him; the ruler of the peoples set him free;
zh: 王就派人去釋放他， 統治眾民的把他釋放了。

en: he made him lord of his house and ruler of all his possessions,
zh: 王立他執掌朝政， 管理王一切所有的，

en: to bind his princes at his pleasure and to teach his elders wisdom.
zh: 使他可以隨意捆綁王的群臣， 把智慧教導王的長老。

en: Then Israel came to Egypt; Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
zh: 後來以色列到了埃及， 雅各在含地寄居。

en: And the LORD made his people very fruitful and made them stronger than their foes.
zh: 耶和華使他的子民生育眾多， 使他們比他們的敵人更強盛。

en: He turned their hearts to hate his people, to deal craftily with his servants.
zh: 他改變敵人的心去憎恨他的子民， 用詭詐待他的眾僕人。

en: He sent Moses, his servant, and Aaron, whom he had chosen.
zh: 他差派了他的僕人摩西， 和他揀選的亞倫。

en: They performed his signs among them and miracles in the land of Ham.
zh: 他們在敵人中間施行他的神蹟， 在含地顯明他的奇事。

en: He sent darkness, and made the land dark; they did not rebel against his words.
zh: 他命黑暗降下，使那地黑暗； 他的話是不能違背的。

en: He turned their waters into blood and caused their fish to die.
zh: 他使埃及的水都變成血， 使他們的魚都死掉。

en: Their land swarmed with frogs, even in the chambers of their kings.
zh: 在他們的地上，以及君王的內室， 青蛙多多滋生。

en: He spoke, and there came swarms of flies, and gnats throughout their country.
zh: 他一發命令，蒼蠅就成群而來， 並且虱子進入他們的四境。

en: He gave them hail for rain, and fiery lightning bolts through their land.
zh: 他給他們降下冰雹為雨， 又在他們的地上降下火燄。

en: He struck down their vines and fig trees, and shattered the trees of their country.
zh: 他擊打他們的葡萄樹和無花果樹， 又毀壞他們境內的樹木。

en: He spoke, and the locusts came, young locusts without number,
zh: 他一發命令，蝗蟲就來， 蚱蜢也來，多得無法數算，

en: which devoured all the vegetation in their land and ate up the fruit of their ground.
zh: 吃盡了他們地上的一切植物， 吃光了他們土地的出產。

en: He struck down all the firstborn in their land, the firstfruits of all their strength.
zh: 他擊殺了他們境內所有的長子， 就是他們強壯的時候所生的頭生子。

en: Then he brought out Israel with silver and gold, and there was none among his tribes who stumbled.
zh: 他領自己的子民帶著金銀出來； 他們眾支派中沒有一個畏縮的。

en: Egypt was glad when they departed, for dread of them had fallen upon it.
zh: 他們出來的時候，埃及人很歡喜， 因為埃及人都懼怕他們。

en: He spread a cloud for a covering, and fire to give light by night.
zh: 他展開雲彩作遮蓋， 夜間有火光照。

en: They asked, and he brought quail, and gave them bread from heaven in abundance.
zh: 他們一求，他就使鵪鶉飛來， 並且用天上的糧食使他們飽足。

en: He opened the rock, and water gushed out; it flowed through the desert like a river.
zh: 他裂開磐石，水就湧流出來； 在乾旱之處水流成河。

en: For he remembered his holy promise, and Abraham, his servant.
zh: 因為他記念他向自己的僕人亞伯拉罕應許的聖言。

en: So he brought his people out with joy, his chosen ones with singing.
zh: 他帶領自己的子民歡歡樂樂出來， 帶領自己的選民歡呼著出來。

en: And he gave them the lands of the nations, and they took possession of the fruit of the peoples' toil,
zh: 他把多國的地土賜給他們， 他們就承受眾民勞碌的成果，

en: that they might keep his statutes and observe his laws. Praise the LORD!
zh: 為要使他們謹守他的律例， 遵守他的律法。 你們要讚美耶和華。
